hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】美联储加息？当交易者看到加息即将到来时；【CRYPTO】这些比特币指标表明 2 月份 60,000 美元的抛售可能已经触底；【FINANCE】三月份，沃伦·巴菲特向 CNBC 开玩笑说这是一次“小额收购”。伯克希尔的文件可能已经透露了这一点。

items.title: Fed to hike? When traders see a rate increase coming
items.summary: Traders on prediction market platforms see increasing odds that an interest rate hike from the central bank comes by July 2027.
items.title_zh: 美联储加息？当交易者看到加息即将到来时
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台上的交易员认为，央行在 2027 年 7 月之前加息的可能性越来越大。

items.title: These bitcoin metrics suggest February’s $60,000 selloff may have marked the bottom
items.summary: Realized cap stabilization, historically elevated RHODL readings and deeply negative funding rates all point toward a potential cycle low for bitcoin forming earlier this year.
items.title_zh: 这些比特币指标表明 2 月份 60,000 美元的抛售可能已经触底
items.summary_zh: 实现的上限稳定、历史上较高的 RHODL 读数以及深度负的融资利率都表明比特币可能在今年早些时候形成周期低点。

items.title: Warren Buffett teased to CNBC a ‘tiny purchase’ in March. Berkshire filing may have revealed it
items.summary: When asked in March whether Berkshire was still putting money to work, Buffett said the conglomerate had made "one tiny purchase."
items.title_zh: 三月份，沃伦·巴菲特向 CNBC 开玩笑说这是一次“小额收购”。伯克希尔的文件可能已经透露了这一点
items.summary_zh: 三月份，当被问及伯克希尔是否仍在投入资金时，巴菲特表示，该集团已经进行了“一笔小额收购”。

items.title: More die of suspected Ebola as WHO warns that numbers will rise further
items.summary: In its latest update, the World Health Organization says there have now been 139 suspected deaths and 600 cases.
items.title_zh: 世界卫生组织警告称，更多人死于疑似埃博拉病毒，死亡人数将进一步上升
items.summary_zh: 世界卫生组织在最新更新中表示，目前已有 139 例疑似死亡病例和 600 例病例。

items.title: How business operations teams use Codex
items.summary: See how business operations teams can use Codex to create initiative briefs, strategy updates, leadership decision packets, progress updates, and more from real work inputs.
items.title_zh: 业务运营团队如何使用 Codex
items.summary_zh: 了解业务运营团队如何使用 Codex 根据实际工作输入创建计划简报、战略更新、领导决策包、进度更新等。

items.title: Alibaba reveals more powerful Zhenwu AI chip, new LLM
items.summary: Alibaba announced updates to its AI offerings, including a more powerful chip and a new large language model.
items.title_zh: 阿里巴巴展示更强大的真武AI芯片、新法学硕士
items.summary_zh: 阿里巴巴宣布对其人工智能产品进行更新，包括更强大的芯片和新的大型语言模型。

items.title: Standard Chartered to cut over 15% of corporate functions roles as it targets higher returns
items.summary: Standard Chartered will trim corporate functions roles and target a more than 20% increase in income per employee by 2028 as it seeks stronger returns.
items.title_zh: 渣打银行将削减超过 15% 的企业职能职位，以实现更高回报
items.summary_zh: 渣打银行将削减企业职能，并计划到 2028 年将每位员工的收入增加 20% 以上，以寻求更强劲的回报。

items.title: Nvidia earnings call drama: Will Jensen Huang talk 'Trump' and China chips after Xi summit?
items.summary: Both Nvidia's earnings and its commentary on its financial report are expected to be big tests for U.S. equities.
items.title_zh: 英伟达财报电话大戏：习近平峰会后黄仁勋会谈论“特朗普”和中国芯片吗？
items.summary_zh: 英伟达的盈利及其对财务报告的评论预计将成为美国股市的重大考验。

items.title: One of the market's hottest stock themes is buying everything AI can't replace
items.summary: The search for HALO stocks is a hot theme in the stock market. There is now an ETF to invest in it.
items.title_zh: 市场最热门的股票主题之一是购买人工智能无法取代的一切
items.summary_zh: 寻找HALO股票是股市的热门话题。现在有一个ETF可以投资它。

items.title: Days After Hosting Trump, Xi Deepens Ties With Putin
items.summary: China’s leader Xi Jinping called for a halt to fighting in the Middle East, ignored Russia’s war in Ukraine and took a veiled swipe at the United States.
items.title_zh: 接待特朗普几天后，习近平深化与普京的关系
items.summary_zh: 中国领导人习近平呼吁停止中东战斗，无视俄罗斯在乌克兰的战争，并对美国进行了含蓄的抨击。

items.title: How Iran Gained Leverage in the War
items.summary: Outmatched militarily, Iran used “triangular coercion” by attacking Gulf states and closing the Strait of Hormuz. It points to a long-term U.S. vulnerability.
items.title_zh: 伊朗如何在战争中获得影响力
items.summary_zh: 在军事上处于劣势的伊朗利用“三角胁迫”攻击海湾国家并关闭霍尔木兹海峡。它指出了美国的长期脆弱性。

items.title: Trump Says He Postponed a ‘Very Major Attack’ on Iran, Leaving Mideast on Edge
items.summary: President Trump threatened “another big hit” on Iran, saying the country had days to return to the negotiating table, as Pakistan continued its mediation efforts to end the war.
items.title_zh: 特朗普称他推迟了对伊朗的“非常重大的袭击”，让中东陷入紧张状态
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统威胁要对伊朗进行“又一次重大打击”，称伊朗有几天时间重返谈判桌，而巴基斯坦则继续为结束战争进行斡旋努力。

items.title: Despite Trump’s pledge, a CBDC is being explored behind closed doors, says former CTFC chair
items.summary: Publicly, the U.S. has fiercely opposed a Central Bank Digital Currency, but former CFTC Chairman Timothy Massad said it is inevitable and there will be one sooner or later.
items.title_zh: CTFC 前主席表示，尽管特朗普做出了承诺，但 CBDC 仍在秘密探索
items.summary_zh: 美国公开强烈反对央行数字货币，但美国商品期货交易委员会前主席蒂莫西·马萨德表示，这是不可避免的，迟早会有的。

items.title: Pan-European stablecoin effort expands to 37 lenders in push back against U.S. dollar dominance
items.summary: Qivalis, a stablecoin initiative backed by a group of European banks, aims to issue a stablecoin later this year to deepen the euro's role in tokenized finance.
items.title_zh: 泛欧稳定币合作范围扩大至 37 家，以对抗美元主导地位
items.summary_zh: Qivalis 是一项由欧洲银行集团支持的稳定币计划，旨在于今年晚些时候发行稳定币，以深化欧元在代币化金融中的作用。

items.title: Tether acquires SoftBank’s stake in Twenty One Capital as share price jumps 5%
items.summary: Tether has acquired SoftBank's stake in Twenty One Capital, with SoftBank's representatives stepping down from its board of directors.
items.title_zh: Tether 收购软银 Twenty One Capital 股份，股价上涨 5%
items.summary_zh: Tether 已收购软银在 Twenty One Capital 的股份，软银代表将辞去其董事会职务。

items.title: Qivalis expands euro stablecoin consortium to 37 banks
items.summary: Qivalis added 25 European banks to its euro stablecoin consortium, reaching 37 institutions, including Luxembourg's state-owned Spuerkeess.
items.title_zh: Qivalis 将欧元稳定币联盟扩展到 37 家银行
items.summary_zh: Qivalis 将 25 家欧洲银行加入其欧元稳定币财团，机构数量达到 37 家，其中包括卢森堡国有的 Spuerkeess。

items.title: Bank of England outlines tokenization, stablecoin vision for UK finance
items.summary: The central bank plans to publish draft rules for systemic sterling stablecoins next month and finalize them by the end of this year.
items.title_zh: 英格兰银行概述了英国金融的代币化和稳定币愿景
items.summary_zh: 央行计划下个月发布系统性英镑稳定币规则草案，并在今年年底前最终确定。

items.title: South Carolina Governor signs pro-crypto, anti-CBDC bill into law
items.summary: The new legislation bans state entities from accepting or requiring payments in CBDC, and offers strong support for crypto mining.
items.title_zh: 南卡罗来纳州州长签署支持加密货币、反对 CBDC 的法案成为法律
items.summary_zh: 新立法禁止国家实体接受或要求 CBDC 付款，并为加密货币挖矿提供强有力的支持。

items.title: Ark Invest buys combined $4.4 million in Bullish shares as stock rebounds from five-day drop
items.summary: The Cathie Wood-led investment firm collectively bought $4.4 million worth of Bullish shares on Monday and Tuesday across three of its ETFs.
items.title_zh: 随着股价从五天下跌中反弹，Ark Invest 总共购买了价值 440 万美元的 Bullish 股票
items.summary_zh: 这家由 Cathie Wood 领导的投资公司周一和周二总共购买了其三只 ETF 中价值 440 万美元的 Bullish 股票。

items.title: Introducing OpenAI for Singapore

items.title_zh: 为新加坡推出 OpenAI
items.summary_zh: OpenAI for Singapore 启动了一项多年的人工智能合作伙伴关系，以扩大部署、培养本地人才，并通过人工智能支持企业和公共服务。

items.title: Bitcoin holds near $77,400 as derivatives signal caution
items.summary: Crypto markets flashed green on Wednesday, but falling futures open interest and mixed altcoin performances suggest traders are reducing risk rather than chasing the rebound.

items.summary: Margin longs on Bitfinex have climbed to a two-and-a-half year high as bitcoin struggles below key technical resistance near $78,000.
items.title_zh: 随着多头触及 2.5 年高点，Bitfinex 交易员在连续五天的下跌期间双倍押注比特币
items.summary_zh: 随着比特币努力跌破 78,000 美元附近的关键技术阻力位，Bitfinex 的保证金多头已攀升至两年半高点。

items.title: European Commission launches MiCA review as global crypto regulatory landscape shifts
items.summary: The European Commission launched a MiCA consultation open through Aug. 31, asking whether the crypto framework needs updating.

items.summary_zh: 欧盟委员会启动了 MiCA 咨询，咨询时间持续到 8 月 31 日，询问加密框架是否需要更新。

items.title: ‘Not all 200-day moving averages are equal’: K33 argues February’s $60K low still marks cycle’s maximum drawdown
items.summary: While bitcoin has struggled since revisiting its 200-day moving average at around $82,000, K33 maintains that the cycle bottom is still in.
items.title_zh: “并非所有 200 天移动平均线都是平等的”：K33 认为 2 月份 6 万美元的低点仍然标志着周期的最大回撤
items.summary_zh: 尽管比特币自重新触及 82,000 美元左右的 200 日移动均线以来一直在挣扎，但 K33 坚持认为周期底部仍然存在。

items.title: CAB, Europol secure another 500 BTC likely tied to Irish drug trafficking case

items.summary: President Sally Kornbluth spoke in front of a packed crowd about growing challenges to the U.S. research ecosystem as funding for America’s top research universities becomes increasingly strained.
items.title_zh: 为好奇心驱动的科学提供理由
items.summary_zh: 萨莉·科恩布鲁斯校长在拥挤的人群面前发表讲话，谈到随着美国顶尖研究型大学的资金日益紧张，美国研究生态系统面临着日益严峻的挑战。

items.title: China confirms order for 200 Boeing planes, calls aviation key area for U.S. cooperation
items.summary: China has agreed to buy 200 Boeing jets, its first major order in nearly a decade, U.S. President Donald Trump said last week.
items.title_zh: 中国确认订购200架波音飞机，称航空业是中美合作的关键领域
items.summary_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普上周表示，中国已同意购买 200 架波音飞机，这是近十年来的第一笔重大订单。

items.title: JPMorgan's summer reading list for the wealthy includes books on AI, leadership and lemons
items.summary: JPMorgan’s annual summer reading list, which has become the go-to selection of beach books for the wealthy, has 14 titles this year.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通为富人准备的夏季阅读清单包括有关人工智能、领导力和柠檬的书籍
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通年度夏季读物清单已成为富人海滩读物的首选，今年有 14 本书。

items.title: Berkshire Hathaway has revamped its portfolio — Here's how the new stocks are trading
items.summary: Berkshire Hathaway took a $2.6 billion stake in Delta Airlines and increased its shares in Alphabet by 224%.
items.title_zh: 伯克希尔哈撒韦公司调整了其投资组合——以下是新股票的交易方式
items.summary_zh: 伯克希尔·哈撒韦公司以 26 亿美元收购了达美航空的股份，并将其在 Alphabet 的股份增加了 224%。

items.title: White House touts deals on soybeans and rare earths after Trump-Xi summit, while China talks up tariff cuts
items.summary: The meeting between U.S. President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping last week yielded new pacts, though the sides have provided differing details.
items.title_zh: 特习峰会后，白宫大肆宣扬大豆和稀土交易，而中国则讨论削减关税
items.summary_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普和中国国家主席习近平上周的会晤达成了新协议，但双方提供了不同的细节。

items.title: Xi basks in spotlight as he hosts Putin days after Trump
items.summary: Two presidential visits days apart is how Xi Jinping wants the world to see him: talking to everyone, tied to no-one.
items.title_zh: 习近平在特朗普当选几天后接待普京，成为众人瞩目的焦点
items.summary_zh: 相隔几天的两次国家主席访问是习近平希望世界看到他的方式：与所有人交谈，不与任何人挂钩。

items.title: Trump exerts iron grip on Republican Party with Massie defeated
items.summary: Victory over a Republican rebel in Kentucky shows the president's strength but his power comes with risks for the midterms.
items.title_zh: 特朗普对共和党实施铁腕控制，马西落选
items.summary_zh: 肯塔基州对共和党叛乱分子的胜利显示了总统的实力，但他的权力也给中期选举带来了风险。

items.title: Lithuania's leaders take shelter during drone air alert
items.summary: Flights were suspended and people were urged to take shelter after a suspected drone was detected near the Belarus border.
items.title_zh: 立陶宛领导人在无人机空中警报期间避难
items.summary_zh: 在白俄罗斯边境附近发现疑似无人机后，航班暂停，并敦促人们避难。

items.title: Man who murdered teen TikTok star in Pakistan gets death sentence
items.summary: Sana Yousaf's murder highlights a pattern of violence against women in Pakistan, activists say.
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦谋杀青少年 TikTok 明星的男子被判处死刑
items.summary_zh: 活动人士称，萨娜·优素福的谋杀凸显了巴基斯坦针对妇女的暴力行为。

items.title: Trump's Greenland envoy faces uphill battle on mission to make 'friends'
items.summary: Jeff Landry's visit to the territory, a semi-autonomous part of Denmark, has touched a nerve among some Greenlanders.
items.title_zh: 特朗普的格陵兰特使面临交“朋友”使命的艰苦战斗
items.summary_zh: 杰夫·兰德里对这片丹麦半自治地区的访问触动了一些格陵兰人的神经。

items.title: Son of Mango boss arrested over father's fatal fall from cliff
items.summary: Isak, 71, died in December 2024 after falling from a ravine while walking in the Montserrat mountains near Barcelona.
items.title_zh: 芒果老板儿子因父亲坠崖身亡被捕
items.summary_zh: 71 岁的伊萨克于 2024 年 12 月在巴塞罗那附近的蒙特塞拉特山脉散步时从峡谷坠落身亡。

items.title: Father-of-eight killed in San Diego mosque shooting hailed as hero
items.summary: Security guard Amin Abdullah, one of three killed in the attack, was described as "a shining light".

items.summary_zh: 保安阿明·阿卜杜拉是袭击中丧生的三人之一，他被描述为“一道闪亮的光芒”。

items.title: Nigeria arrests former minister in hiding after corruption conviction
items.summary: The former power minister was sentenced to 75 years in jail in absentia earlier this month.
items.title_zh: 尼日利亚逮捕腐败定罪后躲藏的前部长
items.summary_zh: 这位前电力部长本月早些时候被缺席判处 75 年监禁。

items.title: Singer Patrick Bruel denies wave of sexual assault allegations in France
items.summary: Among Bruel's latest accusers is well-known TV and radio presenter Flavie Flament, who alleges he raped her in 1991.
items.title_zh: 歌手帕特里克·布鲁埃尔否认在法国发生的性侵犯指控
items.summary_zh: 布鲁尔的最新指控者之一是著名电视和广播节目主持人弗拉维·弗拉门特 (Flavie Flament)，她声称布鲁尔于 1991 年强奸了她。

items.title: Head of W.H.O. Defends Its Response to Ebola Outbreak
items.summary: Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus said criticism of the World Health Organization may have reflected a “lack of understanding” about how the agency works.
items.title_zh: 世卫组织负责人捍卫其对埃博拉疫情的反应
items.summary_zh: 谭德塞表示，对世界卫生组织的批评可能反映出人们对该机构的运作方式“缺乏了解”。

items.title: Killing in Japan Stirs Fears of Tokuryu Crime Rings
items.summary: Four teenage boys were arrested in the killing of a woman at her home. The police say they might have been directed by a new type of transient criminal network known as tokuryu.
items.title_zh: 日本杀人事件引发人们对德龙​​犯罪团伙的担忧
items.summary_zh: 四名十几岁的男孩因在家中杀害一名妇女而被捕。警方表示，他们可能是受到一种名为“tokuryu”的新型临时犯罪网络的指挥。

items.title: The French Civil Servant Accused of Drugging More Than 100 Women
items.summary: For years, prosecutors have accused Christian Nègre, once a senior official, of slipping diuretics into women’s drinks. Despite admitting some accusations in an interview with a French daily, he is yet to stand trial.
items.title_zh: 法国公务员被控对100多名女性下药
items.summary_zh: 多年来，检察官一直指控曾经担任高级官员的克里斯蒂安·内格雷(Christian Nègre)在女性饮料中添加利尿剂。尽管他在接受法国日报采访时承认了一些指控，但尚未接受审判。

items.title: China Confirms It Will Buy 200 Boeing Planes
items.summary: Beijing’s acknowledgment on Wednesday that tariffs were discussed in talks with President Trump signals it was prepared to push back if the U.S. revives duties.
items.title_zh: 中国确认将购买200架波音飞机
items.summary_zh: 北京周三承认在与特朗普总统的会谈中讨论了关税问题，这表明如果美国恢复关税，中国准备推迟。

items.title: James Roscoe, Deputy British Ambassador to the U.S., Leaves Job Abruptly
items.summary: James Roscoe, a diplomat who previously worked for the royal family and at the United Nations, left his role without an immediate explanation.
items.title_zh: 英国驻美国副大使詹姆斯·罗斯科突然离职
items.summary_zh: 曾在王室和联合国工作过的外交官詹姆斯·罗斯科(James Roscoe)在没有立即解释的情况下离职。

items.title: As Ukraine Strikes Russian Oil Sites, an Environmental Disaster Unfolds
items.summary: After invading more than four years ago, Moscow has usually been the one causing ecological disaster. But Kyiv’s strikes, intended to cut into the Kremlin’s oil revenue, have flipped the script.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰袭击俄罗斯石油基地，一场环境灾难上演
items.summary_zh: 在四年多前入侵之后，莫斯科通常是造成生态灾难的一方。但基辅旨在削减克里姆林宫石油收入的罢工却扭转了局面。

items.title: Trump’s Portrait Pops Up on Rickshaws in India to Mark America’s 250th
items.summary: The president is popping up on the back of the iconic three-wheeler to kick off America’s 250th anniversary celebrations in India.
items.title_zh: 特朗普肖像出现在印度人力车上，纪念美国成立 250 周年
items.summary_zh: 总统突然出现在标志性三轮车的后面，为在印度举行的美国 250 周年庆祝活动拉开序幕。

items.title: Telegram group at center of Jane Street insider-trading allegations in Terra collapse
items.summary: Newly unsealed filings detail a private chat dubbed ‘Bryce’s Secret’ that Terraform’s estate says gave Jane Street an informational edge before UST’s collapse.
items.title_zh: Telegram 集团是 Terra 崩溃中 Jane Street 内幕交易指控的中心
items.summary_zh: 新近公开的文件详细介绍了一次名为“布莱斯的秘密”的私人聊天，Terraform 的遗产管理机构表示，在 UST 倒闭之前，这段聊天为 Jane Street 提供了信息优势。

items.title: Too many cooks: How regulatory infighting is choking the UK's crypto hub ambitions
items.summary: While the FCA opens its doors to market pilots, structural delays and legislative friction are fueling industry frustration over a framework trailing behind the U.S. and Europe.

items.title: Germany's AllUnity plans Swedish krona stablecoin, pushes into AI agentic payments

items.title: Justin Solomon appointed associate dean of engineering education
items.summary: MIT faculty member in electrical engineering and computer science to focus on innovation in engineering education and new pedagogical approaches.

items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院电气工程和计算机科学教员，专注于工程教育和新教学方法的创新。

items.summary: The prestigious fellowship funds graduate studies at Stanford University.

items.summary_zh: 这项享有盛誉的奖学金资助斯坦福大学的研究生学习。

items.title: Study: Firms often use automation to control certain workers’ wages
items.summary: MIT economists found US companies tend to target employees earning a “wage premium,” which increases inequality but not necessarily productivity.
